message:
fix(sync): drop state lock guard before returning on semaphore close path

When AcquireFuture and OwnedAcquireFuture detect that the semaphore has
been closed, they remove themselves from the waiters list but previously
returned Poll::Ready(Err(Closed)) while still holding the MutexGuard on
the internal state. This could cause contention or subtle ordering issues
if the waker fires synchronously upon the future completing.

Now explicitly drops the state guard and clears waiter_id before
returning the error, matching the pattern used in the successful
acquisition path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
